## v0.1.2

- Generate a unique value for each `{uuid}` Dynamic Placeholder occurrence in the same prompt.
- Use Raycast-generated preference types for command preferences.
- Use the runtime default locale for prompt list sorting and Markdown file ordering.
- Run the Raycast distribution build before local checks in GitHub Actions so generated Raycast types are available.
- Centralize Prettier target handling and add the explicit Raycast-style quote setting.
- Document Raycast publish Pull Request follow-up handling.
- Configure Git identity for Raycast publish in GitHub Actions.
